theme_and_archetype.rationale: To create a 'premium' feel for the nature-themed water reminder, a deep ocean dark theme provides an immersive, cinematic experience. It makes the aqua gradients and neon/bioluminescent accent colors pop, resembling deep sea exploration and glowing plant life.

buttons.primary: LinearGradient background, full rounded, glowing drop shadow (shadowColor: '#00E5FF', shadowOpacity: 0.5), Outfit bold text.
buttons.quick_add: Circular glassmorphism buttons with icon inside, arranged in an arc or row at the bottom of the screen.

water_visualization.description: A background fill that rises from the bottom of the screen based on daily percentage. Uses react-native-reanimated for smooth wave movement.

cards.style: Dark translucent glassmorphism to blend with the deep ocean background. Subtle 1px white/10% border.

onboarding.layout: Centered content with full-screen ocean background. Smooth fade-in transitions. Input fields for weight, wake/sleep time using bottom sheets.

home.layout: Large circular progress ring or a full-screen rising water level behind the main UI. Large typography for current intake (e.g., '1200 / 2500 ml'). Floating action buttons for quick add (Water, Coffee, Tea).
home.animations: Water rising animation on add. Small bubble particles floating upwards.

stats.layout: Bento grid layout for weekly and monthly stats. Bar charts using react-native-chart-kit or victory-native. Streaks represented by a growing plant icon.

achievements.layout: Grid of badges (ocean creatures). Locked badges are dim/grayscale, unlocked ones glow brightly with bioluminescent colors.

interactions.add_drink: Spring animation scale down/up on tap. Trigger waterfall or splash particles using reanimated.
interactions.water_rise: Smooth layout animation using withTiming or withSpring when daily amount increases.

images.description: Deep underwater ocean surface for onboarding or main background. To be used with a dark overlay.
Calm water ripples for stats or settings background texture.

testing.attributes: Add testID prop to all touchables, text inputs, and dynamic text fields (e.g., testID='quick-add-water-button', testID='daily-progress-text').

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo project. Do not use web-only DOM libraries (like HTML divs, framer-motion, or Shadcn standard UI).
Use StyleSheet or Tailwind (via NativeWind) if configured, but ensure React Native View/Text primitives are used.
Implement the background using expo-linear-gradient and the provided Pexels background images with an dark overlay (rgba(4, 15, 22, 0.8)).
Use react-native-reanimated for the rising water level animation on the Home screen.
For the quick add buttons, use a glassmorphism style (rgba background with border) floating over the water animation.
Use Lucide-react-native icons for the UI and badges as specified in the media.icons section.
Ensure the gamification 'Streak' uses the 'Sprout' icon, and 'Achievements' use sea creature metaphors (Turtle, Fish) to match the nature/ocean theme.
